subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Shed the radiance of Thy grace upon these yearning souls, and open wide the gates of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار آن مشتاقان را تجلی عنايت فرما و ابواب موهبت بگشا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love and unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
